user_query: Update fathers maple kissed taco option to Birria tacos

updates.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 3 > Father > Day 7 > Dinner > DIY Taco Night — Maple-Kissed Skillet

meal_suggestion.from: Assemble made‑to‑order tacos: warm corn tortillas, top with lean beef, shredded lettuce, diced tomato, cheddar, and salsa. Optional lime, avocado, or light sour cream. Pair with a simple side salad or beans for extra fiber.
meal_suggestion.to: Slow‑braise chuck roast or brisket with dried chiles (guajillo, ancho), garlic, onion, tomato, and warm spices until very tender. Shred the meat and keep the braising liquid (consommé) warm. Dip corn tortillas in the consommé and lightly pan‑fry until pliable. Fill tortillas with shredded birria, top with chopped white onion and cilantro, and serve with lime wedges and a small bowl of consommé for dipping. Offer pickled onions or sliced radish and a side of beans or a simple salad.

nutrition_note.from: Lean beef provides high‑quality protein; corn tortillas supply carbohydrates; lettuce and tomato add volume and micronutrients; cheddar contributes calcium and fat; salsa offers flavor with relatively low calories. To boost fiber, use whole‑grain tortillas or add beans; to reduce sodium, opt for low‑sodium salsa and lighter cheese.
nutrition_note.to: Birria provides high‑quality protein from slow‑braised beef and is rich in flavor from chiles and spices. The dish can be higher in fat and sodium depending on the cut of meat and cooking liquid; choose leaner cuts, skim excess fat from the consommé, and serve on corn tortillas with plenty of fresh onion and cilantro to balance richness. Pairing with a side salad or beans boosts fiber and micronutrients.

short_description.from: A quick, customizable taco night featuring lean beef, corn tortillas, fresh veggies, cheddar, and salsa.
short_description.to: Savorable birria tacos: tender, slow‑braised beef served in warm corn tortillas with a rich consommé for dipping, topped with chopped onion, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime.

updates.reasoning: Transformed 'Maple‑Kissed' taco dinner into Birria tacos per request. Rewrote name, short_description, meal_suggestion, ingredients, and nutrition_note to reflect the new dish.
